{{Expand}}

{{Infobox goldsign
| name = Sandviper Goldsigns
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Sandviper Goldsigns]] hiss and use green madra.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Sandvipers]] possess [[sandviper]] Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Goldsigns]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
